Justification: The blender shall be powered by a single-speed motor with a minimum wattage of 300W, optimized for energy efficiency (target <15 Wh per blending cycle). A pulse function shall be included for controlled bursts.; Blades shall be constructed from durable stainless steel, designed for easy user replacement without tools. Recycled stainless steel will be explored for blade manufacturing if cost-effective and feasible without compromising performance or safety.; The blending jar shall be designed to optimize ingredient flow towards the blades, minimizing ingredient adherence to jar walls to less than 5% by weight after a standard blend cycle.

The maximum weight of the assembled blender shall not exceed 1.5 kg.; The housing shall be constructed from high-quality ABS plastic with a minimum of 30% post-consumer recycled content. The base shall be stable during operation but designed to facilitate disassembly.; Integrated carrying features, such as a handle molded into the housing or lid, shall be incorporated where feasible to reduce part count and enhance portability.

A Li-ion battery shall provide a minimum of 15 blending cycles per charge, with each cycle defined as 30 seconds of blending at high speed with the standard test mix. The battery compartment must be designed for user replacement using standard Phillips head screws.; A USB-C charging port shall be utilized for universal compatibility and faster charging times.; The charging indicator shall clearly communicate charging status (charging, fully charged, low battery).; The battery shall be sourced with a high percentage of recycled content where available and cost-effective. A clear battery take-back or recycling program shall be outlined.

The blending jar shall be made from high-quality, impact-resistant ABS plastic with a minimum of 30% post-consumer recycled content. Materials will be selected for mono-material composition where possible to facilitate recycling.; The motor housing shall also be constructed from durable ABS plastic with a minimum of 30% post-consumer recycled content.; All materials in contact with food shall be BPA-free and phthalate-free.; The blades shall be made from durable stainless steel, designed for longevity and effective cutting.

The blending jar and lid shall be easily hand-washable.; The blade assembly shall be designed for safe and easy detachment without the need for tools.; The motor base shall be wipeable and designed to prevent liquid ingress during cleaning.

Robust safety interlocks shall be implemented, designed for durability and potential replacement.; Overheating protection for the motor shall be included, with an automatic shut-off mechanism.; All materials used shall be food-grade, BPA-free, and phthalate-free.

Target a minimum of 30% post-consumer recycled content for all plastic components (housing, jar, lid).; The product shall be designed for disassembly using snap-fit or screw-based assembly, avoiding glues. All plastic components shall be clearly labeled with their material type (e.g., ABS, PP) for recycling.; Packaging shall be minimized, utilizing recycled and recyclable materials, and designed to reduce shipping volume and weight.; A clear battery take-back or recycling program shall be implemented.

The design shall be clean and simple, with ergonomic grips integrated into the main components (e.g., jar, lid, handle).; Natural or low-VOC colorants shall be used. A limited, popular color palette (e.g., black, white, gray) will be offered to streamline manufacturing.; Ergonomic design choices shall not compromise disassembly or repairability.
The blending jar capacity shall be between 350ml and 500ml.; The jar shall feature clearly marked volume indicators for accurate measurement.

The operational noise level shall aim for below 85 dB during typical operation.; Efficient motor and blade design shall be prioritized for noise reduction over complex sound-dampening materials. Any sound dampening material used must be easily separable for recycling.

Motor longevity shall be rated for a minimum of 500 hours of use.; The battery shall be rated for a minimum of 500 charge cycles before significant capacity degradation.; Ice crushing capability: Ability to crush 5 standard ice cubes (approx. 20g each) with 50ml water in 30 seconds, without causing motor overstress, resulting in uniformly crushed ice particles.; Blending time: Ability to achieve a smooth blend within 30-60 seconds for standard ingredients.

Strict adherence to a target retail price of $50-$100 USD is required.; Prioritize cost-effective sustainable materials with high recycled content, robust design, and essential repairability. Avoid features or materials that significantly exceed this budget.

The battery compartment shall be designed for user replacement using standard screws. Common wearing parts, such as seals and blades, shall be available as affordable spare parts and designed for easy user replacement.; Clear, accessible repair and maintenance instructions shall be provided via a QR code on the product or packaging, linking to a dedicated website or online resources.; The product must be designed for disassembly using common household tools.
